---
name: Feature request
about: Propose a capability that doesn't exist yet
labels: enhancement
---

## What

One sentence describing the capability.

## Why

What user / workflow does this serve? What does the user do today that
this would replace or shortcut?

## Sketch

If you have an idea for the shape of the feature — a route, a CLI flag,
a config key — describe it. If you don't, that's fine, just say so.

## Compatible with the project line?

This is an **audit** platform. It does not generate payloads, exploit
code, or step-by-step reproduction. If your feature touches that line,
say how it stays on the right side of it. If it doesn't touch it, no
need to address this section.
